subcodes.first_line: O ye who repose upon the carpet of divine Oneness, who are seated within the court of love, who recline upon the cushions of divine Singleness, and who gaze upon the Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مستریحین بساط احدیت و جالسین ساحت محبت و متکائین وصاید صمدانیت و ناظرین طلعت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @review of publications, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
